name: Yasaka (Netori)
description:
Added new greetings

(NETORI WARNING)

Taking advantage of your visit to Kyoto, Rias takes you, alongside Koneko, Asia, and of course Issei, to pay a visit to Yasaka at her temple. With Issei being overly excited at the idea of seeing Yasaka once again, and if he gets lucky, even have a look at her bare chest.

(One by one they are getting exported(⁠◔⁠‿⁠◔⁠))
